title: Luis Rivera - Resume
text:
Luis Rivera
3039606369 | lrivera30ds@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/luisrivera98

title: Luis Rivera - Resume
section: Bachelor of Arts in Public Policy and Administration
text:
Bachelor of Arts in Public Policy and Administration
Brigham Young University - Idaho | Rexburg, ID
Sep 2018 - Dec 2021
- Emphasis in Public Administration
- GPA: 3.89
- Academic Scholarship - Thomas E. Ricks Grant

title: Luis Rivera - Resume
section: Bachelor of Science in Data Science Online Coursework
text:
Bachelor of Science in Data Science Online Coursework
Brigham Young University - Idaho | Rexburg, ID
Aug 2024 - Present
- Additional courses taken through the BYU-I BS in Data Science major as prerequisite coursework for MS in Data Science.

title: Luis Rivera - Resume
text:
Admin Analyst I
New Jersey Department of Transportation | Ewing, NJ
Jan 2023 - May 2024
- Developed internal protocols for managing $3.5 million in annual federal funds related to the Intelligent Transportation Resource Center. - Managed federal contracts using the Financial Management Information System. - Conducted research on Intelligent Transportation Systems to improve traffic flow and safety. - Provided support in developing the annual in-house budget for the Transportation Mobility Research Unit. - Participated in State Transportation Innovation Council quarterly meetings.

title: Luis Rivera - Resume
text:
Instructor Eval/Statistics TA
Brigham Young University-Idaho | Rexburg, ID
Apr 2021 - Dec 2021
- Assigned grades for student coursework. - Conducted exam review sessions and tutoring for a class of 50 students. - Monitored BYU-I online instructor presence for 24 instructors daily.

title: Luis Rivera - Resume
text:
Custodian
Brigham Young University-Idaho | Rexburg, ID
Jan 2019 - Apr 2020
- Performed routine cleaning and maintenance tasks across campus buildings. - Managed waste disposal and maintained cleanliness in waste areas. - Assisted with event setups and post-event cleanups.

title: Luis Rivera - Resume
text:
Ambassador
Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints | San Fernando, CA
Aug 2016 - Jul 2018
- Oversaw the well-being of 30 full-time ambassadors. - Provided community service and humanitarian aid. - Shared the teachings of Jesus Christ and engaged in religious education. - Trained ambassadors for missionary life and responsibilities.
